shadows.name: fab-lift
shadows.purpose: Floating Add Player button. The only persistent resting shadow. Signals the FAB floats above page content.

shadows.name: dialog-lift
shadows.purpose: Override match dialog and blocking modals. Signals the surface prevents interaction with content behind it.

shadows.name: streak-glow
shadows.purpose: Ambient celebratory glow on the hot-streak section border. Not elevation; personality.

shadows.name: winner-glow
shadows.purpose: Gold drop-shadow filter on trophy icon for the winner state. Celebratory, not structural.

motion.name: card-enter
motion.purpose: Court cards slide up into view when a new round is committed. Staggered 80ms per card.

motion.name: winner-pop
motion.purpose: Court card pops when a winner is recorded. Fast confirmation of the result.

motion.name: duo-form
motion.value: scale(0.92) opacity(0) → scale(1.04) opacity(1) → scale(1), 0.4s ease-out
motion.purpose: Permanent partner pair appears with a small bounce on formation. Celebrates the partnership.

motion.name: streak-glow-anim
motion.purpose: Ambient pulse on hot-streak section. Slow and atmospheric, not demanding.

motion.name: tab-slide
motion.purpose: Tab transitions slide in the direction of navigation (left when advancing, right when retreating). Makes navigation feel spatial.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action. Used for Generate Round, Add Player, Save. Tactile press with scale-95 on active.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background-color: #16a34a; color: #fef2f2; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 10px; border: none; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease-out, transform 0.15s ease-out; user-select: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #15803d; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #16a34a; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions and cancel controls. Transparent background, bordered, tactile on press.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background-color: transparent; color: #64748b; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease-out, border-color 0.15s ease-out, transform 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: #f1f5f9; border-color: #cbd5e1; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #16a34a; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: You Pill
components.description: Personalization marker. Appears inline next to the current player's name wherever it shows up.
components.css: .ds-chip-you { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background-color: #dcfce7; color: #16a34a; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; line-height: 1.2; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Court Card
components.description: Signature component. Shows two teams head-to-head. Highlighted for the current player's court with a primary ring.
components.html:
Court 1
Jan YouAlex
vs
SamMorgan
components.css: .ds-court-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-court-card--personal { border-color: #16a34a; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #16a34a; } .ds-court-header { margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-court-label { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: #64748b; letter-spacing: 0.01em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-court-matchup { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-team { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; flex: 1; } .ds-player { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #020817; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .ds-vs { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #64748b; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-chip-you { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background-color: #dcfce7; color: #16a34a; padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Player List Item
components.description: Row in the player management list. Shows name, optional You pill, and sit-out state (strikethrough, muted).
components.html: Jan You
components.css: .ds-player-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-player-name { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #020817; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .ds-player-row--sitting-out .ds-player-name { text-decoration: line-through; color: #64748b; } .ds-sit-out-btn { background: transparent; border: none; padding: 4px; border-radius: 6px; color: #64748b; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; transition: color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-sit-out-btn:hover { color: #f97316; } .ds-chip-you { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background-color: #dcfce7; color: #16a34a; padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field. Used for player names, session names. Bordered, focus ring matches sport primary.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; background-color: #ffffff; color: #020817; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 12px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; transition: border-color 0.15s ease-out, box-shadow 0.15s ease-out; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-input:hover { border-color: #cbd5e1; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: #16a34a; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(22, 163, 74, 0.2); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Tab Nav Item
components.description: One of four bottom tabs: Round, Players, History, Settings. Active state uses the sport primary color.
components.css: .ds-tab-bar { display: flex; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: #ffffff; } .ds-tab { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 3px; padding: 10px 16px; background: transparent; border: none; cursor: pointer; color: #64748b; flex: 1; transition: color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-tab:hover { color: #020817; } .ds-tab--active { color: #16a34a; box-shadow: inset 0 -2px 0 #16a34a; } .ds-tab-icon { flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-tab-label { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.2; }

narrative.overview:
Rally is designed for the moment a player pulls out their phone between points. Two seconds, courtside, with one question: am I up next, and who am I playing? Everything in the interface earns its place by answering that question faster.

The system's personality is playful, casual, and celebratory — but discipline keeps it from becoming loud. Personality is earned. A streak lands with orange glow and a flame icon. A win pops with a trophy. A new court card slides in. These moments feel good because the rest of the interface stays calm.

What this system rejects: fantasy sports and gambling interfaces with dark-mode neon and aggressive stat density; enterprise SaaS dashboards with cold navy palettes and corporate spacing; fitness tracking apps with progress rings and motivational copy; social media feeds with algorithmic sequencing and reaction mechanics.
keyCharacteristics: Mobile-first, dense but legible; designed for a 375px phone in direct sunlight
Sport-adaptive: one CSS variable (--primary) makes the whole UI feel native to the chosen sport
System font stack for instant native feel on every device, zero FOUT
Restrained animation vocabulary that activates only for meaningful moments
Flat elevation by default; shadows reserved for floating and blocking surfaces

rules.name: The Sport Skin Rule
rules.body: The --primary CSS variable is the only color that changes with sport theme. Never hardcode a sport hex in component logic; always reference --primary so the skin stays coherent.

rules.name: The Orange Embargo
rules.body: Streak orange is reserved for hot-streak states. It never appears on buttons, navigation, forms, or decorative elements. When you see orange, it means something.

rules.name: The System Stack Rule
rules.body: Never load a web font for Rally. The native system font is the feature: instant render, no FOUT, culturally native feel on every device.

rules.name: The Glance Test
rules.body: Any screen must communicate its primary piece of information within 2 seconds at arm's length. If it requires reading, the type hierarchy has failed.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Elevation is earned by state change (dialog blocks interaction) or physical separation (FAB floats above page). A shadow on every card collapses the signal value of the real ones.

dos: Do reference --primary for all sport-branded colors. Never hardcode a sport hex in component logic.
Do animate only on meaningful state changes: round commits (card-enter), win confirmation (winner-pop), streak detection (streak-glow), partner formation (duo-form).
Do pair every color state with an icon or label. Color is never the sole signal.
Do apply active:scale-95 to every interactive button and court card team.
Do treat the 'You' pill as the primary personalization signal.
Do ensure every sport theme variant maintains WCAG AA contrast on both light and dark backgrounds before shipping.
donts: Don't use dark-mode neon accents, aggressive stat-density layouts, or high-pressure visual patterns.
Don't use cold navy as a brand palette, corporate typefaces, or data-table-first layouts.
Don't add progress rings, metric overload, or motivational copy.
Don't introduce social feed mechanics: no infinite scroll, algorithmic ordering, or reaction counts.
Don't add resting shadows to cards.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as colored accent stripes.
Don't use gradient text. Use weight or size for emphasis.
Don't introduce a new color for a one-off state without formally adding it to the system.
